title: Head of IT Application Support - Arab Banking Corporation
jd_clean: Bank ABC seeks to recruit a Head of IT Application Support in the Group Information Technology Department based in our Head Office in Bahrain. The Head of Application Support provides bank-wide leadership and accountability for the stability, availability, resilience, and controlled change of the Bank's application and digital service landscape. This includes core banking platforms (e.g., Temenos), payments, digital channels, treasury & markets, CRM, trade finance, AML/KYC & sanctions, regulatory & finance reporting, data platforms, and enterprise integration. The role owns the Run-the-Bank (RTB) and Change-the-Bank (CTB) operating model and plays a critical role in shaping the Run-and-Change interface between the Bank, IT vendors, and Managed-Service providers, ensuring that production services are delivered in a predictable, secure, compliant, and cost-effective manner across a hybrid cloud environment spanning on-premise, private cloud, and public cloud platforms. As part of the Bank's technology transformation agenda, the role is responsible for supporting and executing the application support strategy for core banking and all associated ecosystems, including cloud-hosted deployments, vendor-managed services, and complex integration patterns. The Job holder is expected to modernise and adopt AI-enabled capabilities across application support; this includes embedding disciplined ITIL-aligned service management in collaboration with other technology teams. Finally, the Head of Application Support acts as a senior contributor to the wider Group Technology Strategy, supporting technology governance, regulatory readiness, risk management, and architecture discipline Responsibilities of the role: The job holder will be responsible for: Strategy and Governance Define, own and continuously evolve the Application Support strategy aligned with business objectives and the wider Group technology strategy, witch clear roadmap around Temenos and its digital ecosystem. Work with other technology partners and key stakeholders to establish and enforce a robust governance framework for RTB and CTB, ensuring clear accountability between internal teams, vendors, and managed-service providers. Ensure the application support team comply with regulatory, risk, and internal control requirements, providing senior-level assurance for audits, regulatory reviews, and other examinations. Support the GCITO in shaping and executing Group-wide technology governance, including policy adherence, architectural discipline, service standards, and technology risk management. Sponsor and gradually adopt AI capabilities across application support, ensuring appropriate governance and measurable operational benefits . Application Ecosystem Management Lead the definition and execution of application lifecycle and obsolescence management, ensuring early engagement with systems owners to timely decommission, migrate, or consolidate systems in line with the Bank's core banking and digita

title: Technical Manager / Head of Engineering

The ideal candidate combines strong technical depth, leadership capability, and strategic vision, with the ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-demand environment. Establish and enforce engineering standards, best practices, and governance. Department Leadership & Team Management Lead, mentor, and manage a team of software engineers, developers, and technical specialists. Oversee multiple teams including frontend, backend, full-stack, mobile, and other technical functions. Project Delivery & Execution Ensure successful delivery of projects within scope, timeline, and quality standards. Oversee the full software development lifecycle (SDLC), from planning to deployment. Identify risks, bottlenecks, and technical challenges, and implement effective solutions. Collaborate closely with product, operations, and business teams. Architecture & System Design Review and approve system architectures to ensure scalability, reliability, and security. Guide teams in designing robust, maintainable, and high-performing systems. Ensure proper documentation and knowledge sharing across teams. Quality, Security & Infrastructure Ensure implementation of strong QA practices and code quality standards. Oversee infrastructure, DevOps practices, and system performance. Enforce cybersecurity standards and ensure system integrity and compliance. Innovation & Continuous Improvement Stay up to date with emerging technologies and industry trends. Drive innovation in AI, automation, and system optimization where applicable. Continuously improve processes, tools, and team efficiency. Required Qualifications Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. 10+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 5 years in a leadership role. Proven experience managing large, multidisciplinary engineering teams. Strong background in system architecture, software design, and scalable systems. title: Head of Engineering

You will work at the intersection of AI, data platforms, and scalable software systems , leading talented engineers while remaining close to the technical architecture and product delivery. Experience building platforms from scratch / Where AI & Data is core - Similar industry (Satellite, Drones etc) 10+ years of progressive technical experience , evolving from hands-on software/AI/platform engineering into roles such as Principal Engineer, Tech Lead, Solutions Architect, or Engineering Manager/Director. Highly technical and hands-on , still actively coding, reviewing merge requests, and engaging in deep technical discussions. 5+ years of leadership experience , managing and scaling diverse engineering teams of 25+ individual contributors . 3+ years building commercial products/platforms in geospatial, remote sensing, Earth observation, or image analytics . Experience in climate, nature, or agri-tech is a strong plus. 3+ years building AI/ML-driven products where data science is core to the platform (not experimental or add-on features). 3+ years in fast-paced startup environments , comfortable with ambiguity, rapid iteration, and shipping real products. Not suited for candidates with purely enterprise B2B SaaS, research-only, or internal tooling backgrounds. Responsibilities Lead and mentor a team of software engineers Drive delivery of AI-powered and data-driven applications Work closely with product and data teams to build scalable systems Contribute to architecture and technical strategy Ensure high standards in performance, reliability, and engineering quality Requirements Experience leading software engineering teams Background building AI or data-driven products Strong development experience with: Python or Java , OR JavaScript / TypeScript Experience in fintech, banking, or financial services is highly desirable Strong experience working in modern cloud environments What’s Offered Competitive salary and benefits Full relocation package to Dubai (including family support) Opportunity to build AI products with real-world impact Work with a highly talented global engineering team

title: Chief IT Projects Management
company: Dubai Careers - A Smart Dubai Initiative
jd_clean: Job Description الهدف العام المساهمة الفاعلة في رفع كفاءة وفاعلية تنفيذ مشاريع الدائرة ضمن نطاق الاختصاص الوظيفي، من خلال تطوير وتطبيق الأطر والمنهجيات المعتمدة لإدارة المشاريع والبرامج، ومتابعة التخطيط والتنفيذ الفعّال لها، وربطها بمؤشرات أداء كمية ونوعية لقياس مستوى التقدم وجودة التنفيذ، والمساهمة في إدارة محفظة المشاريع وتحليل أولوياتها والعوائد المتحققة منها، وتقديم الدعم الفني والاستشاري لمتخذي القرار ومسؤولي المشاريع في مجالات إدارة الموارد والمخاطر والتغيير المؤسسي، بما يضمن تكامل المبادرات، وكفاءة التنفيذ، والالتزام بالتشريعات والسياسات المعتمدة، وتحقيق الاتساق مع الخطط التشغيلية والتوجهات العامة والاستراتيجية للدائرة وحكومة دبي المهام والمسؤوليات الرئيسية الإشراف والمتابعة الفنية على برامج ومشاريع الدائرة ضمن نطاق الاختصاص الوظيفي من خلال وضع الأطر والمنهجيات التي تضمن تحقيق الأهداف الاستراتيجية في مجالات التحول الرقمي، والأنظمة المالية المركزية، واستدامة المشاريع الحكومية ذات الصلة الإشراف الفني على فرق عمل المشاريع في مكتب ادارة المشاريع ومتابعة تنفيذ الخطط التشغيلية والموازنات، وضمان الانسيابية في التطبيق بين المشاريع والبرامج المختلفة على مستوى الدائرة تقديم الدعم الفني والاستشاري للرئيس المباشر في كافة الجوانب المرتبطة بالتخطيط الاستراتيجي واتخاذ القرارات المتعلقة بالمشاريع الكبرى إدارة محفظة المشاريع (Project Portfolio Management) وتحديد أولوياتها بناء على العائد المؤسسي وموائمتها مع الرؤية الاستراتيجية للدائرة واستراتيجية حكومة دبي المرتبطة بهذا الشأن تقييم أداء المشاريع الاستراتيجية والتشغيلية من خلال مؤشرات الأداء الرئيسية (KPIs) وتحليل الانحرافات، وتقديم تقارير دورية للإدارة العليا تتضمن التوصيات اللازمة للتحسين الإشراف الفني المباشر على تطوير سياسات وأدلة إدارة المشاريع وتحديثها بالتنسيق مع الجهات المعنية، بما يتماشى مع أفضل الممارسات العالمية مثل PMI و PMO و COBIT و ITIL المشاركة الفاعلة في إعداد دراسات الجدوى الشاملة للمبادرات والمشاريع الجديدة ذات الطابع الاستراتيجي، وتقييم عوائدها (ROI) المالية والفنية، ورفع التوصيات للرئيس المباشر الإشراف على إعداد طلبات العروض والمناقصات (RFPs) وضمان مواءمتها مع السياسات المعتمدة، وتوجيه مدراء المشاريع خلال المراحل المختلفة من الطرح حتى الترسية تمثيل الإدارة في اللجان الفنية والاستراتيجية المشتركة مع الجهات الحكومية والخاصة، لضمان التكامل بين المبادرات التقنية والمالية على مستوى حكومة دبي قيادة عمليات التغيير المؤسسي وإدارة المخاطر على مستوى البرامج لضمان تحقيق أعلى مستويات الكفاءة والحوكمة في تنفيذ المشاريع توجيه فرق العمل متعددة التخصصات (Cross-Functional Teams) في إدارة المشاريع المشتركة بين القطاعات الداخلية والخارجية، وتفعيل التواصل الفعّال بين أصحاب المصلحة العمل وبشكل مستمر على بناء وتطوير قدرات مدراء المشاريع والفِرق التنفيذية من خلال التدريب والإرشاد وضمان نقل المعرفة واستدامتها داخل الإدارة متابعة وتقييم أداء الموردين والاستشاريين وضمان الالتزام بشروط العقود والمخرجات الفنية المعتمدة ضمن الأطر الزمنية المحددة إعداد التقارير الاستراتيجية للإدارة العليا واللجان التنفيذية حول حالة المشاريع، والعقبات، والمخاطر، والتوصيات الخاصة بتسريع الإنجاز وتحسين الأداء المؤسسي الإشراف على تنفيذ مبادرات التحول الرقمي في إدارة المشاريع لضمان توافقها مع متطلبات title: Chief Information Security Officer - Hedge Fund - $530k (base)
jd_clean: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) - Elite Investment Platform - Abu Dhabi - Up to $530k Base (Tax-Free) Durlston Partners is working with a premier, global investment platform to find a hands-on Chief Information Security Officer. Based in Abu Dhabi, this foundational role requires you to build and scale the firm's core information security capabilities from the ground up as the platform evolves to support institutional clients. What You’ll Do Strategy & Governance: Define the global cybersecurity and operational resilience strategy, establishing frameworks aligned with NIST, ISO 27001, and DORA across US, EU, Middle East, and APAC operations. Cloud & AI Security: Embed secure-by-design practices into cloud infrastructure, APIs, and AI/ML systems, partnering directly with engineering to integrate security into the SDLC. Risk & Operations: Lead threat modelling, incident response, and BC/DR planning. Build out core capabilities like IAM, vulnerability management, and vendor risk management. Leadership: Act as a trusted advisor to executive leadership on cyber risk, while building and leading a high-impact global security team. What They’re Looking For 10+ years of cybersecurity experience with a proven track record of building and maturing security programs in cloud-native, application-driven environments. Strong leadership background within fintech, investment platforms, or heavily regulated financial environments. Deep technical expertise in cloud security (AWS, Azure, GCP), modern application security, data protection, and AI governance frameworks. Experience navigating multi-jurisdictional compliance. Professional certifications (CISSP, CISM, CISA) are highly preferred. What They Offer Top-Tier Compensation: Up to $530,000 USD Base Salary + Discretionary Bonus (100% tax-free). Relocation & Visa: Full visa sponsorship with all associated costs covered by the company. Premium Benefits: Comprehensive family medical/life insurance, 30 days holiday (+ UAE public holidays), and an annual education allowance for up to three dependent children. If you are interested, please apply! Alternatively, feel free to reach out to david@durlstonpartners.com for a confidential discussion.

title: Director of Operations: Enterprise Delivery + RevOps
jd_clean: About Ranger AI Ranger is the first and most advanced AI platform purpose-built for Engineering, Industrial, and Government clients. We turn decades of static documents into live, dynamic intelligence, data that powers faster bids, stronger proposals, and smarter decisions. Our primary focus is helping clients win and deliver more through bidding and proposals, while also transforming procurement, risk management, and other complex workflows that require nuance, technical rigor, and sector-specific expertise. This is why clients choose Ranger over generic AI offerings from the well-known brands. With backing from top tier Venture Capital firms and links to Apollo Global Management, we are here to anchor a new market reality - One that is active across enterprise accounts and high-performing SMBs in North America, Europe, and the GCC. Why this role exists We’re hiring a Director of Operations to build the systems that make Ranger scale. We're scaling revenue while assembling three dynamic pillars at once: how we deliver (Customer Success + implementations), how we run our commercial engine (pods + pipeline discipline), and how we operate internally (AI-native workflows + documentation). This role exists to turn founder context, lessons learned, and cutting-edge best practice into systems: playbooks, SOPs, dashboards, and operating rhythms, enabling scale without losing quality. You will begin as an individual contributor, working directly with the co-founder to build the operating foundation hands-on. What you'll own Customer Success methodology Co-design and implement a stage-gated, enterprise-grade CS/implementation model. Define the methodology from PoC → phased launch → scale, with milestones, cadence, escalation, and quality standards. Convert it into SOPs a technical account manager can run independently. Build client-facing templates (status updates, QBRs, health checks, escalation protocols) and establish feedback loops into product and delivery. Account Pods + commercial operating system Operationalize how we sell and deliver through clear workflows and shared accountability. Define how Account Pods coordinate across deal → delivery. Create pod handoffs, role definitions, and "definition of done" checkpoints. Drive pipeline hygiene and forecasting discipline. RevOps function Starting with foundations: CRM governance (stages, required fields, rules of engagement), pipeline reporting, forecasting cadence, dashboards, and commercial workflows that reduce confusion and increase conversion across the lead funnel, inbound/outbound. Internal AI workflows optimization Make Ranger's internal execution AI-native and scalable. Build repeatable workflows that compress coordination overhead. Implement "visibility without narration" dashboards. Standardize documentation and handoffs so output quality doesn't depend on who is in the room. title: QNB3598 - Vice President Digital Quality Control
jd_clean: About QNB Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region. QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines. QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard & Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3) and Fitch (A+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications. Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine. QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events. title: EOI - Project Director (Offshore)

Specifies and directs the implementation and completion of one or more major projects or programs, including responsibility for managing safety, scope, cost, schedule and risk, and ensuring appropriate reporting and governance is in place. title: Associate Director Product Management FSI KSA
jd_clean: Job Description As Associate Director, Product Management at Publicis Sapient, you will serve as our clients’ trusted advisors in defining, articulating and executing a product strategy that transforms customer experience and business outcomes. title: Technical Director
jd_clean: Job Description WSP is seeking an experienced Technical Director to provide senior-level technical leadership on a major infrastructure programme in Riyadh. The role requires a strong technical background across large-scale infrastructure projects, with the ability to oversee design, engineering coordination, delivery assurance, and technical governance within a PMCM environment. As the Technical Director, you will act as the technical authority for the programme—ensuring quality, compliance, integration, and timely delivery of multidisciplinary infrastructure works. Responsibilities Provide senior technical leadership across all infrastructure disciplines (roads, utilities, structures, transportation systems, etc.). Serve as the technical authority, ensuring engineering solutions meet project standards, codes, and client requirements. Lead technical reviews and provide strategic recommendations to resolve complex engineering challenges. Oversee design management activities, ensuring coordinated, compliant, and constructible designs. Review consultant and contractor deliverables for quality, completeness, and alignment with programme objectives. Ensure integration between various design packages, infrastructure interfaces, and adjacent assets. Support the Project Director and wider PMCM leadership team on technical matters impacting schedule, cost, and quality. Implement technical governance frameworks, processes, and procedures across all project stages. Coordinate with construction management teams to ensure design intent is maintained through delivery. Engage with clients, consultants, contractors, and regulatory authorities to resolve technical issues. Provide authoritative guidance during technical meetings, workshops, and interface coordination sessions. Manage technical risk, change control, and decision-making processes. Ensure all engineering works comply with international standards and Saudi regulatory requirements. Drive continuous improvement, technical quality assurance, and lessons-learned processes. Identify and mitigate technical risks throughout design and construction phases. Mentor multidisciplinary engineering teams and promote technical excellence. Support resource planning, capability development, and team performance management. Foster a collaborative, high-performance culture aligned with WSP values. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering or related engineering discipline (Master’s preferred). 20+ years of experience in large-scale infrastructure projects (roads, utilities, structures, transportation, etc.). Demonstrated experience in senior technical leadership roles within PMCM or PMC environments. Strong knowledge of design management, engineering processes, and construction methodologies. Experience working in the Middle East, preferably Saudi Arabia. Strong technical problem-solving and decision-making skills. Excellent communication and stakeholder management capabilities. title: Project Director (Expression of Interest)

This role is strictly focused on design leadership within an Engineering Design Consultancy environment. The successful candidate must have extensive GCC experience in the design of roads, highways, bridges, tunnels, and related infrastructure, with a strong background in managing multidisciplinary engineering teams from concept and feasibility through detailed design and tender documentation stages. Establish and oversee design strategies, technical standards, and quality benchmarks. Ensure alignment of project design objectives with client and regulatory requirements. Lead multidisciplinary coordination across civil, structural, geotechnical, traffic, drainage, and utilities disciplines. Oversee design risk management and technical assurance processes. Master’s Degree preferred. 20+ years of experience in engineering design and project delivery. Proven experience in a Project Director / Design Director / Senior Design Manager role. Strong experience in Middle East projects (Oman/GCC preferred). Demonstrated success delivering large-scale infrastructure projects. Strong commercial acumen and contract management experience.
